chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT LARKANA Crl.B.A.No.S-266 of 2024 (Inayatullah Vs. The State) DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE For the hearing of the bail application. 01.07.2024. Mr. Amjad Ali Panhwar, Advocate for the applicant. Mr. Aitbar Ali Bullo, D.P.G for the State. -.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- IRSHAD ALI SHAH, J;- It is alleged that on the arrest of the applicant has been secured an unlicensed SBBL Gun of 12 bores from him, by the police party of P.S Karampur, led by HC Muhammad Ayoob, for which the present case was registered. 2. The applicant on refusal of bail by learned Sessions Judge, Kashmore @ Kandhkot, has sought the same from this Court by way of instant application u/s. 497 Cr. PC. 3. Heard arguments and perused the record. 4. Despite advance information, no independent person was associated with witnessing the incident; such omission on the part of the police could not be overlooked. The recovery is alleged by the applicant to have been foisted upon him. The applicant has already been admitted to bail in a police encounter case by this Court in the early hours of the day. The case has finally been challaned and there is no likelihood of absconsion or tampering with the evidence on the part of the applicant. In these circumstances, a case for the release of the applicant on bail on point of further inquiry is made out. 5. Under the discussed circumstances, the applicant is admitted to bail subject to his furnishing surety in the sum of Rs.50,000/- and P.R bond in the like amount to the satisfaction of the learned trial Court. 6. The instant bail application is disposed of accordingly. JUDGE
